mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id as student_id, u.real_name, si.student_number, o1.org_name as college_name, o2.org_name as major_name, si.grade, o3.org_name as class_name, u.avatar_url FROM parent_student_relation psr JOIN user u ON psr.student_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN student_info si ON u.user_id = si.student_id LEFT JOIN organization o1 ON si.college_id = o1.org_id LEFT JOIN organization o2 ON si.major_id = o2.org_id LEFT JOIN organization o3 ON si.class_id = o3.org_id WHERE psr.parent_id = #{parentId} AND psr.verification_status = 1

SELECT u.user_id as student_id, u.real_name, si.student_number, o1.org_name as college_name, o2.org_name as major_name, si.grade, o3.org_name as class_name, u.avatar_url FROM user u LEFT JOIN student_info si ON u.user_id = si.student_id LEFT JOIN organization o1 ON si.college_id = o1.org_id LEFT JOIN organization o2 ON si.major_id = o2.org_id LEFT JOIN organization o3 ON si.class_id = o3.org_id WHERE u.user_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO parent_student_relation ( relation_id, parent_id, student_id, relation_type, verification_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( UUID(), #{parentId}, #{studentId}, COALESCE(#{relationType}, 'PARENT'), COALESCE(#{verificationStatus}, 0), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT ci.counselor_id, u.real_name, u.phone, u.email, ci.title, ci.introduction FROM student_info si JOIN organization o ON si.college_id = o.org_id JOIN counselor_info ci ON ci.counselor_id = ci.counselor_id JOIN user u ON ci.counselor_id = u.user_id WHERE si.student_id = #{studentId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM parent_student_relation WHERE student_id = #{studentId} LIMIT 1
